header_wiring_status.transparency_py_investigation: transparency.py reads from metadata['airlock_response_headers'] to set response headers. It is in DO NOT TOUCH. To wire X-Airlock-Admission as a response header, the guardian would need to add metadata['airlock_response_headers']['X-Airlock-Admission'] in the Step 2.5 block. Escalated as follow-up — not done in this pack.

metrics_status: skipped — no metrics emitted in this pack per scope discipline

regression.failure_note: Pre-existing fathomdb environment failure; present before this pack

blockers_encountered.description: Worktree branch was at b068391 (0.5.4), missing ENABLE-stateprovider + ENABLE-statesplit prereqs (commit 64f9615 on main)
blockers_encountered.resolution: Fast-forwarded worktree branch to 64f9615 via git merge main (clean fast-forward, no conflicts)

blockers_encountered.description: resolve_guardrail_decision is a deferred import inside async_pre_call_hook; patch('airlock.fast.guardian.resolve_guardrail_decision') fails with AttributeError
_mock_store() in integration tests didn't configure get_provider(), causing MagicMock truthy is_quarantined → _raise_provider_protection called → TypeError comparing MagicMock with int
blockers_encountered.resolution: Added get_provider.return_value with is_quarantined=lambda t: False, cooldown_remaining=lambda t: 0.0 to _mock_store() and to test_none_gate_skipped inline mock

blockers_encountered.description: asyncio.get_event_loop().run_until_complete() fails in Python 3.10+ when previous tests closed the event loop ('There is no current event loop')
blockers_encountered.resolution: Changed to asyncio.run() which always creates a fresh event loop

additional_changes_made_in_scope: AdmissionConfig dataclass is defined in BOTH settings.py (for load_airlock_settings integration) and admission.py (for standalone use). The settings.py version is the canonical one used by AirlockSettings; admission.py imports it from settings.py via configure_admission() at runtime.
